about.story_text: Larry Lawn Service is a locally owned business specializing in high-quality lawn cutting and edging services. With 4 years of experience and professional X-Mark equipment, we bring precision and care to every lawn in Doylestown and the surrounding areas.
about.founder_note: Hi, I?m Larry. I started this service to help my neighbors keep their lawns looking their best with reliable, friendly service you can trust.
